workout.warmup: Incline walk · 8–10 min · 3.3–3.5 mph · 6–8% incline — do not skip. This is your back warmup, not just cardio.
workout.finisher: Incline walk · 10 min · 3.3–3.5 mph · 6–8% incline. Skip if session hits 65 min.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.note: June 5 confirmed at 380 × 10 × 3. Holding to reconfirm — June 9 session was compromised. If this feels easy, bump to 390 next session.

exercises.name: Hip Thrust Machine
exercises.note: Plate-loaded — 10 lb increments only. June 5 confirmed at 190 × 12 × 3. Holding to reconfirm after disrupted June 9. Full hip extension, squeeze at top, no hyperextension.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.note: June 9 you got 3 clean sets of 10 — strongest it's felt. Hold at 77 lb. Push for 11–12 on the last set if feeling strong today. Don't chase weight here — hamstrings are the weak link.

exercises.name: Pendulum Squat
exercises.detail: Start with sled only. Add 1 plate per side (45 lb each) if sled feels easy.
exercises.note: New movement replacing goblet squat — no upper back required. Chest against pad, upright torso, squat to parallel or just below. Feel out the pattern on the first set before adding load. Log the sled weight and what you added so we can build from it next session.

exercises.name: Walking Lunge (DB)
exercises.note: First session at 30 lb was June 2. Hold to confirm — bump to 35 lb next session if these feel clean and controlled.

exercises.name: Core Circuit (Back-Safe)
exercises.detail: Pallof Press 40 lb × 10/side + Side Plank 30s/side + Bird Dog × 8/side · 2 rounds
exercises.note: All back-safe. No ab wheel or hollow body until upper back strain is fully resolved.

workout.coach_notes: RDL is OFF until upper back sharpness is completely gone — it returns at 60 lb with straps. Pendulum squat is new so log the weight and feel carefully. If back feels off at any point during the session, skip the remaining exercises and go straight to the finisher walk — do not push through.
